# Why

Describe the reason for this change.

# Scope

Describe the boundaries of this PR and what is intentionally out of scope.

# What Changed

- Summarize the main code, UI, and test changes.

# Contract / API Impact

Describe any request / response, model, or contract changes. If none, say so explicitly.

# Breaking Changes

List the breaking changes, or say `None`.

# Validation

List the exact commands you ran and their outcomes.

# Risk / Rollback

Describe the main risks and how to roll back if needed.

# Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Relevant docs / contracts updated
- [ ] Formatting / linting run
- [ ] Rollback path considered
